reasoning: The document contains a major structural failure in a critical attendance table where a matrix-style organization was flattened into field-value pairs, losing the semantic relationship between committee members and their attendance status. While programmatic signals for content recall are high, the LLM fidelity structural score of 0.5 and specific findings regarding list type conversion and content duplication necessitate human intervention to ensure accessibility standards are met.

The source PDF for Page 2 contains only one NC DIT logo at the top. This constitutes a duplication of content in the converted output.

Specifically, the 'Meeting Minutes' on Page 3 (numbered 1-11) and the 'Standards Committee Goals' on Page 6 (numbered 1-3 for both 2021 and 2022) are all marked as 'list_type': 'unordered'. This loses the specific numbering semantics present in the source.
